types.label: YouTube Video
types.description: With 5+ years of experience creating Minecraft Mods for content creators including MrBeast Gaming, SocksFor1, and more, I can bring your own Minecraft modded video ideas to life. With my knowledge surrounding viewer engagement, video pacing, and visuals, I can help you create a unique and engaging video experiences for your audience. I will be sure to not disappoint you! I even go so far to see beyond the vision of your idea to make your video come to life better than you could've ever imagined for your audience!

types.label: Minecraft Mod
types.description:
This section is for NEW mods ONLY! If you're a youtuber please use the Youtube Video drop down instead. Mod ports/updates use the Minecraft Mod Port drop down. For Minecraft Plugins use the "Minecraft Plugin" drop down. 

 For everyone else, I can create a custom Minecraft mod for you! My main specialty is Minecraft World Generation, but I have experience in everything else such as mobs, visuals, optimizations, and more! I can make mods for Forge, Neoforge, and Fabric mod loaders for any Minecraft version above 1.14.4+! Multi Loader projects are available for versions 1.18+

types.label: Minecraft Plugin
types.description: Although I have no published Minecraft Plugins, I have moderate experience creating plugins for Paper and Spigot servers. I would love to have privilege to do this for a server.

types.label: Minecraft Mod Port / Update
types.description: I can port any mod of your choice to any Minecraft version above 1.14.4+! I can port mods for Forge, Neoforge, and Fabric mod loaders. Multi Loader projects are available for versions 1.18+.

types.label: Other
types.description: Want something else not listed here? I can do other things too! Just let me know what you need and we can discuss it! I am open to new experiences and challenges. As an FYI I do have a performance first approach to my plugin work.
